Generated 2026-06-14T21:58:34.532Z · 2026-05-17T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-17T06:00:00Z

Projection setupRequirement evidence mapCommunication by orbit
Evidence lineage Summary evidence map
Runtime projection Model-derived

Available Time, Visibility Windows, and Handovers all come from the selected-pair runtime projection.

communicationStats | visibilityWindows | handoverEvents
解讀
這是系統依可見時間窗與連線選擇規則推算出的可通訊時間與事件摘要。
資料來源
資料來自本次 report 生成時使用的投影結果；可在 Raw data 對照原始欄位。
限制
不是 iperf/ping 測試、實測吞吐量，也不是實際連線紀錄。
Station lineage Source gap
Source gap

Station metadata covers coordinate authority, elevation cache metadata, terrain-mask defaults, and RF profile gaps.

station-registry:cht-yangmingshan | station-registry:sansa-hartebeesthoek
解讀
這裡用來確認站點座標、高程、地形遮罩與射頻資料是否有明確來源。
資料來源
Sources 分頁會分開列出座標來源、高程來源、地形遮罩來源與射頻硬體缺口。
限制
站點資料不等於完整硬體規格；天線直徑、EIRP、極化若沒有來源，不能視為已知。
Satellite manifests Public source

TLE/OMM manifests disclose records, accepted rows, rejected rows, parser failures, caps, and freshness.

tle:leo | tle:meo | tle:geo
解讀
來源清單、通過篩選的軌道資料，以及實際顯示的衛星數量需要分開判讀。
資料來源
Sources 分頁會保留每個軌道來源的解析結果、篩選限制與更新時間。
限制
公開軌道來源不代表實際服務中的衛星，也不代表真實網路路由。
Known gaps Source gap
Source gap

Packet traces, measured-for-link rain, station RF hardware profile, and some local grid lookups are not sources in this payload.

packet-test-trace | operator-rf-hardware-truth | local-rain-calibration | station-rf-profile | station-elevation-dem-metadata | terrain-mask-default | atmospheric-grid-lookup
解讀
這些是目前缺少的證據，不能只靠模型計算補成真實資料。
資料來源
Source gaps table 逐列列出缺少什麼資料以及會影響哪些判讀。
限制
它不會補上缺少的 packet traces、link-local weather/R0.01 校準或射頻硬體來源。

開啟 Evidence Detail 後會補充解讀、資料來源與限制；原始數值仍保持可見。

Available Time 6h

Total communication time in the selected window.

解讀
儀表顯示選定時間窗內，模型判定可通訊時間的比例。
資料來源
由 visibility windows 與連線選擇規則計算。
限制
不是 iperf/ping 測試、實測吞吐量，也不是實際連線紀錄。
Handovers 5

4 cross-orbit migrations.

Orbit Distribution
LEO: 0.0% MEO: 25.0% GEO: 75.0%
解讀
把軌道分布與換手數一起看，可判斷模型是否在 LEO/MEO/GEO 之間切換。
資料來源
來自 handoverEvents 與 communicationStats.byOrbit。
限制
不是射頻層實際換手，也不是營運網路事件時間。
Visibility Windows 64

Mutual station-to-satellite windows.

解讀
每列 visibility window 是兩站對同一衛星可見時間窗的交集。
資料來源
visibilityWindows 與 visibilityProvenance。
限制
不是實測連線紀錄，也不保證通訊一定成功。
Source limits Geometric pair · visibility-derived onlyModel-derivedSource limits

cross family geometric

解讀
這個等級只說明資料來源可信度，不代表需求已通過驗收。
資料來源
pairSourceAttribution 與 Sources 分頁。
限制
不是服務水準保證、實際路由，也不是配對專屬傳輸路徑。

Summary 欄位解讀

欄位數據代表什麼怎麼解讀來源與限制
Available Time選定時間窗內由模型推得的可通訊時間。看比例與總時長，不要當成封包測試或吞吐量。模型值不是實測服務資料。
Handovers換手政策選出的連線切換結果。與 Handover tab 的逐列事件一起看。不是射頻層實際換手。
Source limits這組站點配對的資料來源可信度。用來判斷 report 能支持到哪一種說法。缺少來源的項目不能用模型自動補成真實資料。

Projection setup

Projection setup 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Station A / B 所選站點與 registry id。 對照 Sources 的 station lineage。 站點資料不代表完整硬體規格。
Time window 投影使用的 UTC 時間範圍。 只代表本次情境輸入。 不是實際營運觀測時間。
Route mode 本次投影使用的資料模式。 確認 report 是用已匯入的 runtime source 生成。 不是實際營運路由。

Requirement evidence map

R1-F3 / R1-D36h

Communication-time statistics are calculated from visibility and serving-link rows.

解讀
這是模型判定兩站在選定時間窗內可通訊的總時間。
資料來源
由 communicationStats.totalCommunicatingMs 與可見時間窗計算。
限制
不是 iperf/ping 測試、實測吞吐量，也不是實際服務紀錄。
R1-F4 / K-E4 / V-MO15 switches

Handover rows show modeled policy changes and cross-orbit migrations.

解讀
換手事件是模型依目前規則選出的連線切換結果。
資料來源
來自 handoverEvents、policyDisclosure 與 modeledOutputs。
限制
不是射頻層實際換手，也不是營運網路事件紀錄。
K-E6Rain impact modeled

Rain attenuation control changes link-budget metrics; model assumptions are listed in the Models tab.

解讀
Rain Rate 是情境輸入，用來檢查模型對降雨衰減的反應。
資料來源
來自 Modeled outputs 與 Atmospheric / rain lineage。
限制
不是本地實測天氣，也不是商用品質保證。
R1-F5HTML + CSV

This readable report is the review surface; CSV export is the row-level data artifact.

解讀
Report 是可讀摘要；CSV 是逐列資料匯出。
資料來源
兩者使用同一份本次投影結果。
限制
CSV 不會提供 Report 中沒有的解讀或來源強度。

Communication by orbit

Communication by orbit 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Orbit LEO/MEO/GEO 軌道類別。 只比較這個選定時間窗內的模型時間。 共同支援三種軌道，不代表該時間窗一定會看到三軌換手。
Duration 該軌道類別累計的模型可通訊時間。 與 Visibility/Handover tabs 交叉檢查。 不是實測連線紀錄。
Duration ms 同一數值的毫秒版本。 用於 CSV/Raw data 對照。 不是服務水準指標。
OrbitDurationDuration ms
LEO0s0
MEO1h 30m5400000
GEO4h 30m16200000
Source limits

Geometric pair · visibility-derived only. Pair derivable from public station coordinates and satellite ephemerides only. No operator or contractual attestation.

Citations and Physical Formulas

3GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2

Free-Space Path Loss (FSPL)

Lfs = 92.45 + 20 log10(dkm) + 20 log10(fGHz)

Computes clear-sky geometric spreading loss between station and satellite. Loss increases logarithmically with distance d and carrier frequency f.

ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1

Rain Attenuation Estimate

Ap = A0.01 (p / 0.01)-(γ + η ln(p)) dB

Estimates additional signal attenuation from rain rate (R0.01) and polarization. The dynamic rain control simulates how different rain-rate inputs reduce link availability.

3GPP TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2

Ground-to-Satellite Handover Policy

Serving Link = argmaxs ∈ Vis { SNR(s) }, with Δt ≥ Tmin and SNR hysteresis ≥ HdB

Defines how the station selects a serving link among visible satellites. The V-MO1 policy limits excessive switching to avoid modeled refocus churn and signal oscillation.

ITU-R S.1528

Asymmetric Satellite Antenna Gain Pattern

G(θ) = Gmax - 2.5 × 10-3 (D/λ · θ)2 dB

Directional gain model for LEO or non-geostationary satellite antennas, used to compute gain reduction at off-axis angle θ.

Data Model-derived

Requirement rows separate answer/value, interpretation, and source strength.

consolidated requirements | runtime projection
解讀
先看需求編號，再看目前可呈現的數據，最後確認來源與缺少的證據。
資料來源
數值來自本次 report 使用的匯出資料，不包含未接入的外部系統資料。
限制
這張對照表不是採購驗收決策。
Interpretation Standards-derived

Interpretation column explains how reviewers should read selected-pair evidence.

Models | Sources | Raw data
解讀
用這欄避免把模型計算值解讀成實測服務資料。
資料來源
解讀只綁定 report 內可見的資料與來源列。
限制
模型值不是實測服務資料。
Source strength Source gap

Source strength discloses whether a row is public source, model-derived, standards-derived, display transform, external evidence, or source gap.

Sources: Source gaps
解讀
標記為 Source gap 的列，代表目前缺少直接證據，不能用推論自動補齊。
資料來源
缺少來源的項目會保留在 Sources 分頁。
限制
標記處沒有 iperf/ping packet-test trace。

Requirement coverage table maps consolidated requirements to selected-pair report data, interpretation, and source boundaries.

Requirement coverage table

Requirements 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Answer / value 目前 report 可以呈現的值。 先確認數值是否存在，再看它是公開來源、模型計算，還是缺少來源。 模型值不是實測服務資料。
How to read 使用者應如何閱讀該值。 避免把模型輸出讀成驗收或營運事實。 不是實測連線紀錄。
Source strength 該列來源強度。 用 chip 分辨公開來源、模型計算、標準公式、畫面轉換、外部證據或缺少來源。 缺少來源的項目不能用模型自動補成真實資料。

Station-side inputs Public source

解讀
每列代表兩個站點在同一顆衛星上同時可見的時間窗。
資料來源
站點座標、高程來源、地形遮蔽設定與顯示位置會分開列在 Sources。
限制

Display transform Display transform

Display transforms only affect camera, labels, mesh, or display lanes; computed visibility remains separate data.

限制

Visibility windows

Visibility windows 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Satellite 這列使用的衛星識別碼。 可到 Raw data 的可見性來源列比對。 來源是公開軌道資料，不代表正在提供服務的衛星。
Orbit LEO/MEO/GEO 軌道類別。 與 Communication by orbit 比較。 不是商用路由層級。
Duration 兩站共同可見時間。 可視為模型候選時間窗。 不是實測連線紀錄。

Handover events
Evidence lineage Handover lineage
Station-side inputs Public source

Station-side inputs: cht-yangmingshan / sansa-hartebeesthoek. Policy uses selected-pair visibility candidates.

station-registry:cht-yangmingshan | station-registry:sansa-hartebeesthoek
解讀
把 From/To 當成模型在同一時間窗內改選服務衛星的前後變化。
資料來源
切換門檻與模型輸入列在 Models 分頁；站點來源列在 Sources 分頁。
限制
不能代表無線層原生換手，也不是實際網路事件紀錄。
Missing packet trace Source gap

Missing packet trace means there is no iperf/ping packet-test timing, throughput, jitter, or loss trace.

packet-test-trace
解讀
這些列只能說明模型何時依政策改選服務衛星。
資料來源
封包測試資料目前缺少，會在 Sources 的缺口清單中保留。
限制
沒有實測延遲、抖動或吞吐量資料。

Handover events are model policy outputs over visibility candidates.

Handover events

Handover events 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Time UTC 模型換手事件時間。 與 selected time window 一起讀。 不是營運商事件時間。
From / To 模型選擇前後的衛星 id。 用於檢查切換順序。 不是實際閘道指派紀錄。
Reason 模型記錄的切換原因。 cross-orbit-migration 表示模型跨軌道類別改選衛星。 不能代表無線層原生換手。
Time UTCFromToReason
2026-05-17T00:00:00Zinitial acquisitionABS-2current-link-unavailable
2026-05-17T00:39:30ZABS-2GSAT0220 (GALILEO 24)cross-orbit-migration
2026-05-17T01:24:30ZGSAT0220 (GALILEO 24)ABS-2cross-orbit-migration
2026-05-17T02:06:00ZABS-2ABS-2A (MONGOLSAT-1)current-link-unavailable
2026-05-17T05:00:00ZABS-2A (MONGOLSAT-1)GSAT0215 (GALILEO 19)cross-orbit-migration
2026-05-17T05:45:00ZGSAT0215 (GALILEO 19)ABS-2cross-orbit-migration
Source limitsPair source limitsStation coordinate and elevation sourcesStation lineageStation RF profile gapsTLE selection policyTLE source manifestRuntime inventorySatellite / TLE lineageOrbit source freshnessDisplay transformsAtmospheric / rain lineageExternal evidence registerMissing evidence registerSource gaps
Evidence lineage Source ledger
Pair boundary Model-derived

Geometric pair · visibility-derived only

geometric-derived | cross-family-geometric
解讀
這裡只說明這組站點配對的資料可信度。
資料來源
來源是站點配對的來源標記與限制說明，不是實際路由紀錄。
限制
沒有宣稱配對專屬傳輸路徑、主動閘道指派或實際路由。
Station metadata Source gap
Source gap

Station metadata lists coordinate authority, elevation cache metadata, terrain-mask defaults, and RF profile gaps.

station-registry:cht-yangmingshan | station-registry:sansa-hartebeesthoek
解讀
用這裡判斷站點座標、高程、畫面位置與 RF 參數分別來自哪裡。
資料來源
站點來源、配對來源與座標來源是不同欄位，不能混在一起判讀。
限制
當 RF 參數不可用時，站點資料不會提供站點專屬 RF 硬體事實。
Satellite source manifest Public source

TLE/OMM manifests disclose records, accepted rows, rejected rows, parser failures, caps, and freshness.

tle:leo | tle:meo | tle:geo
解讀
解讀衛星數量前，先分清楚原始資料筆數、篩選後筆數與畫面實際顯示數量。
資料來源
Accepted rows 與 visible actors 是公開軌道資料經 runtime 篩選後的不同層次。
限制
公開軌道資料不會識別實際服務中的衛星或實際路由。
Atmospheric inputs Source gap
Source gap

Rain-rate control is scenario input; atmospheric lookup rows disclose whether local grid values exist.

unavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p835-6-annex-1 | unavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p836-6-rev-2017 | unavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p837-8 | unavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p839-4 | unavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p840-9
解讀
這是根據情境輸入計算出的模型結果，不是當地實測天氣。
資料來源
Atmospheric / rain lineage 會列出查表值，以及目前不可用的本地網格或校準資料。
限制
不是本地實測天氣，也不是站點校準雨量紀錄。
Gaps Source gap

Missing or unwired sources are listed explicitly and are not implied by model output.

packet-test-trace | operator-rf-hardware-truth | local-rain-calibration | station-rf-profile | station-elevation-dem-metadata | terrain-mask-default | atmospheric-grid-lookup
解讀
要做更強的結論前，必須先確認這裡列出的缺口是否已補齊。
資料來源
Source gaps table 會列出缺少的證據、影響範圍與限制。
限制
缺少來源的項目，不會因為有模型數值就變成真實資料。

This tab reviews where values come from and separates public artifacts, model calculations, display-only transforms, and missing sources.

Source limits

Source limits 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Source tier 這組站點配對的來源等級。 用來判斷 report 可支持到哪種說法。 不是實際路由、服務水準保證或配對專屬傳輸路徑。
Evidence kind 來源分類的細項。 和 badge label 一起看，不要單獨當成驗收結果。 來源分類不會補齊缺少的外部證據。
Truth boundary 本次 report 對資料真實性的界線。 判斷哪些是公開來源、模型計算或缺口。 不能把模型輸出提升成實測資料。
FieldValue
Source tiergeometric-derived
Evidence kindcross-family-geometric
Badge labelGeometric pair · visibility-derived only
Truth boundarygeometric-derived

Pair source limits

  • Pair derivable from public station coordinates and satellite ephemerides only. No operator or contractual attestation.

Station coordinate and elevation sources

Station coordinate and elevation sources 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Station 本列對應的地面站。 先確認站點 id，再和 station lineage 對照。 站點存在不代表完整硬體規格已知。
Coordinate / elevation fields 座標精度、來源等級、高程與地形遮罩。 用來判斷幾何計算的站點輸入從哪裡來。 高程與地形遮罩若是預設或快取，仍要看來源限制。
Effective threshold 模型用於可見性判定的仰角門檻。 和 Visibility / Raw data 的可見性來源一起核對。 不是站點實測地平線或 RF 可用性保證。
StationCoordinate precisionSource tierCoordinate authorityCoordinate noteElevation mTerrain mask degEffective threshold deg
cht-yangmingshanoperator-family-regiongeometric-derivedGeometric-derived (Tier 3)mixed-publicRepresentative regional coordinate; coordinate-specific source is not separated in the current registry. Elevation and terrain mask for the selected pair are public Copernicus DEM GLO-30 derivatives and do not upgrade coordinate authority.4892131
sansa-hartebeesthoekexact-coordsgeometric-derivedGeometric-derived (Tier 3)operator-webCoordinate source is operator or facility web disclosure; operator altitude wins for station elevation, while selected-pair terrain mask uses public Copernicus DEM GLO-30. Pair capability remains separate.1553111

Station lineage

Station lineage 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Station / source strength 站點資料與來源強度。 先看來源強度，再看座標、高程與顯示位置。 站點來源、配對來源與座標來源是不同欄位。
Coordinate / render position 原始座標、座標用途與畫面位置。 判斷哪些是來源座標，哪些只是畫面呈現用轉換。 Display transform 不能當成新的真實座標來源。
Elevation / terrain fields 高程資料集、DEM 細節、地形遮罩與有效門檻。 用來查幾何可見性計算的地面端輸入。 預設地形遮罩或缺少 DEM provenance 時要保留限制。
StationSource strengthCoordinate authorityCoordinate URLCoordinate noteRaw lat/lonCoordinate useRender positionElevation sourceElevation provenanceElevation datasetDEM detailsTerrain maskTerrain sourceEffective threshold
cht-yangmingshanpublic-registry-derivedPublic sourcemixed-publicRepresentative regional coordinate; coordinate-specific source is not separated in the current registry. Elevation and terrain mask for the selected pair are public Copernicus DEM GLO-30 derivatives and do not upgrade coordinate authority.25.155, 121.55operator-family-coordinaterepresentative-coordinateDisplay transformcopernicus-dem-glo-30-public-selected-pair-v1public-dem-derived-selected-pairSource gapcopernicus-dem-glo-30-public-selected-pair-v1 / Copernicus DEM 2021 releasekind=dem-derived; resolution=30; datum=EGM2008 / EPSG:3855; tile=Copernicus_DSM_COG_10_N25_00_E121_00_DEM; cell=row-3041-col-1979; sample=25.15513888888889,121.54986111111111; method=nearest-cell-cog-range-read; sampled=2026-06-12T13:33:44Z; cache=2026-06-13T08:11:34.609Z; license=copernicus-dem-public21 degcopernicus-dem-glo-30-terrain-mask-selected-pair-v1; default=no31

Pair capability remains separate.-25.8872, 27.7075source-coordinatesource-coordinatePublic sourcesansa-operator-altitude-public-page-v1operator-stated-altitude-with-public-dem-terrainSource gapsansa-operator-altitude-public-page-v1kind=operator-stated; resolution=n/a; datum=n/a; tile=Copernicus_DSM_COG_10_S26_00_E027_00_DEM; cell=row-3193-col-2546; sample=-25.8872,27.7075; method=operator-web-altitude-plus-dem-terrain-comparison; sampled=2026-06-12T13:33:44Z; cache=2026-06-13T08:11:34.609Z; license=operator-public-web1 degcopernicus-dem-glo-30-terrain-mask-selected-pair-v1; default=no11

Station RF profile gaps

Station RF profile gaps 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Antenna / EIRP / polarization 站點 RF 硬體參數與來源 id。 不可用值必須保持可見，不能用模型值補掉。 缺少來源時不能宣稱站點專屬 RF 硬體事實。
Elevation / terrain source RF 計算可使用的地面幾何輸入來源。 和 Station lineage 對照來源是否一致。 幾何來源不等於完整 RF 硬體來源。
Boundary 本列不能支持的結論。 看到 source gap 時，結論只能停在模型假設層級。 不是實測服務資料。
StationSource strengthElevation sourceTerrain sourceAntenna diameterAntenna sourcePeak EIRPEIRP sourceTx polarizationPolarization sourceBoundary
cht-yangmingshanunavailableSource gapcopernicus-dem-glo-30-public-selected-pair-v1copernicus-dem-glo-30-terrain-mask-selected-pair-v1; default=nounavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapunavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapunavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapStation RF hardware fields are unavailable; only elevation and terrain-mask registry fields are populated.
sansa-hartebeesthoekunavailableSource gapsansa-operator-altitude-public-page-v1copernicus-dem-glo-30-terrain-mask-selected-pair-v1; default=nounavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapunavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapunavailableunavailable-pending-operator-rf-profileSource gapStation RF hardware fields are unavailable; only elevation and terrain-mask registry fields are populated.

TLE selection policy

TLE selection policy 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Step TLE 來源進入 selected-pair runtime 的處理階段。 依序看來源資料、TLE 解析、TLE/SGP4 共同可見幾何排序、runtime cap、兩站 orbit support、共同可見性、handover 與資料新鮮度。 這不是驗收流程，也不是服務品質排名。
Current value 本次 report 實際使用的 source mode、path，以及 LEO/MEO/GEO 在各階段的數量變化。 用「解析後可用筆數、cap 後筆數、兩站軌道支援篩選後筆數、兩站共同可見衛星數」確認篩選結果。 公開 TLE 只提供軌道元素，不提供通訊品質欄位。
Reason / condition 每一步為什麼會篩選或限制候選衛星。 特別看「為什麼排序後先取前 N 筆」：cap 是瀏覽器互動計算上限，排序是 TLE/SGP4 幾何分數，不是通訊品質排序。 模型判定不能提升成實測 throughput 或營運路由。
StepCurrent valueReason / conditionBoundary
來源資料network-snapshot; LEO: /fixtures/satellites-network/leo-latest.tle | MEO: /fixtures/satellites-network/meo-latest.tle | GEO: /fixtures/satellites-network/geo-latest.tleselected-pair 模式讀取專案內已打包的 CelesTrak GP/TLE 快照；瀏覽器端不即時下載 CelesTrak catalog。公開 TLE 只提供軌道元素來源，不代表衛星正在提供服務，也不是通訊品質量測。
TLE 解析
  • LEO：來源筆數 651，TLE 解析失敗 0，後續 runtime 篩選排除 451
  • MEO：來源筆數 33，TLE 解析失敗 0，後續 runtime 篩選排除 0
  • GEO：來源筆數 574，TLE 解析失敗 0，後續 runtime 篩選排除 514
系統先把 TLE 原始行組解析成 SGP4 可推算的軌道紀錄，之後才進入 selected-pair 可見性計算。解析成功的衛星只是軌道候選，不代表已經是可用通信鏈路。
幾何排序後的 runtime cap
  • LEO：解析後可用 651 筆，先依 selected-pair 的 TLE/SGP4 共同可見幾何分數排序，再最多取前 200 筆；實際進入後續流程 200 筆，因 cap 排除 451 筆
  • MEO：解析後可用 33 筆，先依 selected-pair 的 TLE/SGP4 共同可見幾何分數排序，再最多取前 100 筆；實際進入後續流程 33 筆，因 cap 排除 0 筆
  • GEO：解析後可用 574 筆，先依 selected-pair 的 TLE/SGP4 共同可見幾何分數排序，再最多取前 60 筆；實際進入後續流程 60 筆，因 cap 排除 514 筆
系統先用較粗的 TLE/SGP4 取樣替完整候選排序；排序依據是兩站共同可見總時長、共同可見窗數量，以及兩站較低仰角的最大值。排序後再對 LEO/MEO/GEO 各自套用上限，讓瀏覽器端 selected-pair 計算保持可互動。cap 不是通訊品質排序（not a communication-quality sort）；前 N 筆代表本次 selected-pair 幾何分數較高的候選，不代表營運可用或 SLA 最佳。
selected-pair 軌道支援篩選
  • 兩站共同支援 orbit classes：LEO/MEO/GEO
  • LEO：cap 後 200 筆，兩站 orbit support 篩選後留下 200 筆，因 selected pair 不支援該 orbit class 排除 0 筆
  • MEO：cap 後 33 筆，兩站 orbit support 篩選後留下 33 筆，因 selected pair 不支援該 orbit class 排除 0 筆
  • GEO：cap 後 60 筆，兩站 orbit support 篩選後留下 60 筆，因 selected pair 不支援該 orbit class 排除 0 筆
cap 後只保留兩個地面站都支援的軌道類別。站點 orbit support 是情境限制，不是營運商實際路由證明。
兩站共同可見性
  • 本次共有 64 個兩站共同可見時間窗
  • LEO：accepted 200 筆，這個時間窗內兩站共同可見 0 顆，沒有形成共同可見時間窗 200 筆
  • MEO：accepted 33 筆，這個時間窗內兩站共同可見 3 顆，沒有形成共同可見時間窗 30 筆
  • GEO：accepted 60 筆，這個時間窗內兩站共同可見 60 顆，沒有形成共同可見時間窗 0 筆
篩選後留下的軌道紀錄會用 SGP4、站點座標、各站仰角門檻，以及兩站時間窗交集來計算共同可見。共同可見只表示本次時間範圍內的幾何候選，不是完整服務覆蓋證明。
handover 與通信模型
  • 6 個服務鏈路事件
  • 5 次模型判定換手
  • LEO 通信時間：0s
  • MEO 通信時間：1h 30m
  • GEO 通信時間：4h 30m
共同可見時間窗產生後，handover policy 與 link-budget 模型才會選出不同時間點的服務候選。latency、jitter、speed、rain impact 是模型輸出，不是 TLE 欄位，也不是 iperf/ping 或實測 throughput。
為什麼排序後先取前 N 筆LEO 幾何排序後最多取前 200 筆 / MEO 幾何排序後最多取前 100 筆 / GEO 幾何排序後最多取前 60 筆如果先對完整來源庫做正式可見性與 handover 計算，瀏覽器需要把所有來源衛星沿著整個時間網格做完整 SGP4 取樣與模型推算。這份 selected-pair report 改用互動式上限流程：先做粗略共同可見幾何排序，再套用 cap，最後才做正式 SGP4 可見性與 handover 計算。前 N 筆不被視為通訊品質最佳；若要完整來源庫的正式可見性與 handover 驗證，需要離線完整來源庫計算或提高 runtime cap。
資料新鮮度與更新LEO：fresh，最新 epoch 2026-06-13T23:03:32.116Z | MEO：fresh，最新 epoch 2026-06-13T19:46:07.933Z | GEO：fresh，最新 epoch 2026-06-14T02:28:48.158Z；健康門檻 LEO 14d / MEO 30d / GEO 30d若已打包的 refresh artifact 過舊或不可用，runtime 會 fallback 到 local snapshot fixtures；更新 TLE artifacts 使用 npm run refresh:tle。refresh 只更新軌道快照，不會產生營運商驗證或 live service-quality evidence。

TLE source manifest

TLE source manifest 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Source / orbit 每個軌道來源與軌道類別。 用它追溯衛星列來自哪個 bundled public orbit snapshot。 公開軌道資料不代表衛星正在提供服務。
Records / accepted / rejected 原始筆數、採用筆數與拒絕筆數。 先看篩選結果，再看 runtime 顯示數量。 採用筆數不等於完整來源庫，也不等於營運衛星數。
Cap / health / timestamp runtime 上限、來源健康狀態與時間戳。 用來判斷本次匯出使用的快照狀態。 時間戳不是服務觀測時間。
SourceOrbitPolicyRecordsAcceptedRejectedParser failuresCapHealthTimestamp
tle:leoLEOrefresh-artifact6512004510200fresh2026-06-13T23:03:32.116Z
tle:meoMEOrefresh-artifact333300100fresh2026-06-13T19:46:07.933Z
tle:geoGEOrefresh-artifact57460514060fresh2026-06-14T02:28:48.158Z

Runtime inventory

Runtime inventory 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Orbit LEO/MEO/GEO 軌道類別。 用來比較各軌道資料進入 runtime 的狀態。 不是營運網路分層。
Accepted / runtime cap 來源篩選後筆數與 runtime 顯示上限。 判斷畫面與計算是否只用了子集合。 上限是 runtime 選取限制，不是來源資料總量。
Visible actors 本次畫面或投影實際使用的 actor 數。 和 TLE manifest 的採用筆數分開讀。 不是真實可服務衛星清單。
OrbitSource modeActiveAcceptedRuntime capCappedVisible actors
LEOnetwork-snapshot651200200true0
MEOnetwork-snapshot3333100false3
GEOnetwork-snapshot5746060true60

Satellite / TLE lineage

Satellite / TLE lineage 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Source strength / source path 衛星資料來源強度與檔案路徑。 用來把 actor 追溯回來源快照。 路徑存在不代表資料已驗證為營運狀態。
Format / API / parser fields 來源格式、解析器類別與解析結果。 檢查資料進入 runtime 前是否被拒絕或排除。 解析成功不等於服務可用。
Runtime cap / visible actors runtime 上限與畫面使用數量。 用來解釋為什麼來源筆數和畫面數量不同。 畫面使用數量不是完整星座規模。
OrbitSource strengthSourceSource pathFormat / APIRecordsAcceptedRejectedParser failuresExcluded categoriesRuntime capCappedVisible actors
LEOPublic sourcetle:leo/fixtures/satellites-network/leo-latest.tletle-3le / celestrak-gp-tle6512004510per-orbit-cap200yes0
MEOPublic sourcetle:meo/fixtures/satellites-network/meo-latest.tletle-3le / celestrak-gp-tle333300100no3
GEOPublic sourcetle:geo/fixtures/satellites-network/geo-latest.tletle-3le / celestrak-gp-tle574605140per-orbit-cap60yes60

Orbit source freshness

Orbit source freshness 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Snapshot / fetched UTC 本次使用的軌道快照與取得時間。 用來查資料新鮮度。 取得時間不是本次投影的觀測時間。
Max epoch UTC 來源資料中最新的軌道 epoch。 和投影時間窗一起看，判斷來源是否可能過舊。 epoch 新不代表服務狀態被驗證。
Policy / membership 來源政策與星座歸屬判定。 用來理解篩選依據。 不等於營運商 active assignment。
SourceSource strengthSource modeSnapshot pathFetched UTCMax epoch UTCPolicyConstellation membership
tle:leotle-derivedPublic sourcenetwork-snapshot/fixtures/satellites-network/leo-latest.tle2026-06-14T08:32:49.625Z2026-06-13T23:03:32.116Zrefresh-artifact{"ONEWEB":600}
tle:meotle-derivedPublic sourcenetwork-snapshot/fixtures/satellites-network/meo-latest.tle2026-06-14T08:32:49.625Z2026-06-13T19:46:07.933Zrefresh-artifact{"GALILEO":33}
tle:geotle-derivedPublic sourcenetwork-snapshot/fixtures/satellites-network/geo-latest.tle2026-06-14T08:32:49.625Z2026-06-14T02:28:48.158Zrefresh-artifact{"INTELSAT":6,"INMARSAT":5,"SES":5,"US":5,"CA":3,"ABS":2,"AC":1,"AUS":1,"CIS":1,"THAI":1}

Display transforms

Display transforms 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Source 畫面轉換或顯示用資料來源。 只用來追蹤 UI 如何呈現資料。 Display transform 不會改寫來源真實值。
Input summary 顯示轉換使用的輸入摘要。 用它確認畫面標籤、位置或 lane 的調整原因。 不是計算模型或實測來源。
Limit 顯示轉換不能支持的結論。 看到 display-only 時，不要用它證明來源資料本身。 不是實際路由或連線證據。
SourceSource strengthInput summaryLimit
selected-pair-scene-altitude-compressiondisplay-onlyDisplay transform{"enabled":true,"factor":0.22}Renderer transform only; source ECEF samples remain separate.
selected-pair-scene-camera-framingdisplay-onlyDisplay transform{"pairGeometry":"long-baseline","suggestedAltitudeKm":18000,"suggestedHeadingDeg":0,"suggestedPitchDeg":-80}Camera framing only; it does not alter station or satellite truth.
selected-pair-scene-label-densitydisplay-onlyDisplay transform{"maxVisibleActorLabels":6,"suppressNonActiveTrails":true}Label-density choice only; it does not alter computed visibility.
selected-pair-scene-display-lane-offsetdisplay-onlyDisplay transform{"leoCadenceSeconds":30,"meoCadenceSeconds":60,"geoCadenceSeconds":120}Display lane or label offset only; source coordinates remain separate.
selected-pair-scene-generic-actor-meshdisplay-onlyDisplay transform{"meshClass":"generic-satellite","sourceMode":"tle-first-runtime"}Generic mesh choice only; it is not operator hardware truth.

Atmospheric / rain lineage

Atmospheric / rain lineage 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Lookup value 降雨或大氣查表值。 Scenario rain rate 要和本地觀測或校準天氣分開讀。 不可用的 grid lookup 與本地雨量校準仍是來源缺口。
Midpoint / cell coordinates 查表使用的位置與網格資訊。 用來判斷模型採樣位置。 不是站點本地實測天氣。
Source id / limit 查表來源與限制。 看它是否為標準、模型或來源缺口。 不能宣稱當地即時氣象。
SourceSource strengthMidpoint latMidpoint lonCell latCell lonLookup valueUnitInterpolationSource idLimit
p835-6-annex-1unavailableSource gapunavailableunavailableunavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p835-6-annex-1Atmospheric grid lookup is not bundled; no grid cell value is claimed.
p836-6-rev-2017unavailableSource gapunavailableunavailableunavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p836-6-rev-2017Atmospheric grid lookup is not bundled; no grid cell value is claimed.
p837-8unavailableSource gapunavailableunavailableunavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p837-8Atmospheric grid lookup is not bundled; no grid cell value is claimed.
p839-4unavailableSource gapunavailableunavailableunavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p839-4Atmospheric grid lookup is not bundled; no grid cell value is claimed.
p840-9unavailableSource gapunavailableunavailableunavailable-pending-itu-grid-bundle:p840-9Atmospheric grid lookup is not bundled; no grid cell value is claimed.

External evidence register

External evidence register 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Evidence ID / requirement IDs 外部 artifact 與需求列的對應。 用來查哪個 requirement row 有外部證據可引用。 外部 artifact 不會自動提高其他資料列的來源強度。
Evidence value 外部證據能支持的具體內容。 只在該列描述範圍內使用。 不能外推成未列出的實測或營運事實。
Boundary 該證據的使用界線。 做結論前先確認 boundary 是否允許。 超出 boundary 的說法仍是來源缺口。
Evidence IDRequirement IDsStatusArtifact refsEvidence valueHow to readBoundary
selected-pair-report-smokeR1-F5 / K-E5External evidencetests/smoke/verify-m8a-v4.11-slice5-real-data-surfacing-runtime.mjs | output/selected-pair-source-report/smoke-manifest.jsonReport smoke verifies tabs, requirement rows, source tables, Evidence Detail, HTML report, and CSV export.Use this as smoke evidence for report packaging and the readable evidence page, not as external measurement data.It does not create external packet-test, traffic bridge, DUT, or final written report evidence.
selected-pair-external-source-reconciliationR1-F1 / K-E1 | K-A2 | K-A3-b | K-F2 | (irreducible-1) | (irreducible-2) | (irreducible-3)External evidenceSource gapdeliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/external-source-reconciliation.md | deliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/evidence-manifest.jsonRetained reconciliation compares the selected-pair station values, recovers the Open-Elevation source method for legacy selected-pair elevation cache values, source tier, TLE/standards method, DEM/rain repair paths, and non-observable packet/RF claims against public sources.Use this to decide which slide-facing values are verified, compatible, partial, source-conflicting, source gaps, or not externally observable.It does not prove packet-test traces, native RF handover, active serving route, station RF hardware truth, DUT traffic-generator runs, or final acceptance thresholds.
selected-pair-dem-rain-repair-sourcesK-A3-b | K-F2 | (irreducible-3)External evidenceSource gapdeliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/copernicus-dem-selected-pair-sample-2026-06-12.json | deliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/copernicus-dem-selected-pair-terrain-mask-2026-06-13.json | deliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/rain-source-repair-candidates-2026-06-12.json | deliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/local-rain-calibration-2026-06-13.jsonRetained repair-source artifacts record selected-pair Copernicus GLO-30 tile/cell/datum samples, a selected-pair public-DEM-derived terrain mask, candidate NASA GPM / CWA rain-calibration source paths, and a public CWA local rain statistic mapped to a 5 mm/h demo preset.Use these artifacts to explain which DEM and rain sources repair selected-pair gaps, which stronger claims remain bounded, and how the public local-rain statistic is bounded.They do not provide surveyed RF horizon, full-registry DEM terrain replacement, link-measured weather, long-term R0.01 rain calibration, or packet/RF behavior.
selected-pair-route-governanceR1-T4 / K-D3 | K-F7External evidencescripts/verify-selected-pair-route-governance.mjsRoute governance gate preserves the boundary between the selected-pair route and the legacy fixture route.Use this to confirm the report and selected-pair route did not fall back to the old fixture-only flow.Route governance is not handover authenticity, commercial routing, or packet-test evidence.
phase7-0-24h-soakR1-D4External evidenceoutput/soak/2026-05-15T05-42-07-506Z-phase7-0-full/summary.jsonRetained soak artifact records passed=true, durationMs=86400000, failureCount=0, and sampleCount=1289.Use this as retained run evidence for 24-hour stable operation.Opening the selected-pair report does not rerun the 24-hour soak.
multi-orbit-scale-validationR1-F1 / K-E1External evidenceoutput/validation/phase7.1/2026-05-15T09-04-53.180Z-multi-orbit-scale-1000/summary.jsonScale artifact records observed LEO=600, MEO=65, GEO=30, with targetLeoCount=500 passed.Use this to support source inventory scale, TLE/SGP4 geometry-ranked runtime caps, and visible actor layering in the selected-pair report.Scale validation does not mean all source actors must be visible at once in the selected-pair view.
external-infra-validation-summaryK-A5 | K-B1 | K-C1 | K-F5 | K-F6External evidenceSource gapoutput/validation/external-v02-v06/2026-05-11T16-59-27.404Z-external-validation/summary.jsonExternal validation summary retains local environment details and records that tunnel, NAT, DUT, traffic-generator, ping, and iperf evidence are still missing.Use it to keep class-C external infrastructure evidence separate from the selected-pair runtime report.A partial external package must not be read as passed tunnel, NAT, DUT, or traffic-generator validation.

Missing evidence register

Missing evidence register 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Gap ID / missing evidence 目前 report/package 沒有的證據。 用來判斷哪些結論仍不能成立。 缺口不能被模型數值補掉。
Needed source 要補齊缺口所需的來源。 把它當成後續驗證或接資料的清單。 不是目前已存在的資料。
Impact / boundary 缺口會限制哪些需求或結論。 優先看影響範圍大的列。 不能把缺口列當成通過證明。
Gap IDRequirement IDsSource strengthMissing evidenceNeeded sourceImpactBoundary
packet-test-traceR1-F3 / K-E3 | (irreducible-1) | K-A2Source gapNo ping/iperf or equivalent packet-test time series.Needs retained packet-test logs with endpoint, direction, duration, latency, jitter, loss, or throughput fields.Communication time and handover policy can only be read as model-calculated time and model-selected events.Model values cannot be upgraded into packet-test or real connection evidence.
acceptance-threshold-script(irreducible-2)Source gapNo external acceptance scenario script or pass/fail threshold package.Needs retained scenario cases, thresholds, expected pass/fail results, and reviewer verdict.The report can present an evidence map, but cannot decide acceptance by itself.Requirement coverage table is not a procurement acceptance decision.
local-rain-calibrationK-A3-b | (irreducible-3)Source gapNo measured-for-link local weather, SANSA rainfall sample, scenario-window rain source, or long-term R0.01 calibration.Needs measured local weather for the selected link or long-term station/grid statistics accepted as a climate calibration source.Rain impact remains a standards-derived model response to scenario input; the retained CWA sample only supports a public local rain statistic and a 5 mm/h demo preset.Not measured-for-link weather or R0.01 availability calibration.
operator-rf-hardware-truthK-A3-a | K-F2Source gapSelected-pair payload has no operator station RF hardware source for real dish size, EIRP, polarization, beamwidth, or pattern.Needs station RF hardware sources covering real gain, beamwidth, pattern, EIRP, and polarization if a stronger-than-assumed claim is required.K-A3-a/K-F2 can be read as standards-derived model evidence with assumed Tier-B antenna parameters, but not as operator hardware evidence.Assumed antenna parameters are not operator hardware truth or measured RF evidence.
external-network-bridgeK-F1 | K-B1 | K-C1Source gapNo successful tunnel, bridge, NAT, packet path, or simulated-to-real traffic transcript.Needs topology, interface inventory, route/NAT rules, bridge/tunnel logs, and successful traffic transcript.Class-C network bridge rows can only be marked as external evidence / source gap.Modeled visibility or handover rows cannot prove a physical network bridge.
dut-traffic-generator-runK-F5 | K-F6Source gapNo virtual DUT testbench run and no physical DUT / traffic-generator retained result.Needs DUT identity, traffic profile, command transcript, raw result, redaction policy, and reviewer verdict.The selected-pair report cannot validate DUT or traffic-generator deliverables.Globe projection data is not a testbench program or traffic-generator result.
final-written-report-packageK-F8 | R1-D5Source gapNo final written report package or technical evaluation report artifact is attached.Needs a formal written report, appendix index, artifact references, and reviewer-facing conclusions.HTML report can be an evidence appendix candidate, but cannot replace the formal report.Downloadable HTML is not the final written report.

Source gaps

Source gaps 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Field 缺少來源或需要限制說明的資料項。 看到這些列時，結論要停在已揭露的來源強度。 不是隱含已驗證資料。
Evidence status 目前證據狀態。 source gap 表示沒有直接證據支撐更強說法。 不能用模型輸出自動補齊。
How to read / boundary 使用者應如何解讀及不能怎麼用。 用來避免把合理計算講成真實營運資料。 限制仍然有效，除非來源資料被接入並重新揭露。
FieldSource strengthEvidence statusHow to readBoundary
packet-test-traceSource gapNo iperf/ping packet-test trace.Communication time is calculated by the model, not measured by packet tests.Summary and Visibility expose model values; do not read them as packet-test output.
operator-rf-hardware-truthSource gapSelected-pair report uses assumed Tier-B antenna pattern parameters, but has no operator station RF hardware source.Antenna gain can be read only as standards-derived model output with assumed parameters.Do not read assumed antenna values as station dish size, EIRP, polarization, or measured RF hardware truth.
local-rain-calibrationSource gapA retained public CWA station statistic supports a 5 mm/h demo preset, but no measured-for-link weather or long-term R0.01 calibration is attached.Rain impact is a standards-based model response to scenario input.Not measured-for-link weather.
station-rf-profileSource gapCurrent runtime payload has no station antenna diameter, EIRP, or Tx polarization.Model outputs do not become station-specific RF hardware facts.Missing station RF hardware sources remain visible.
station-elevation-dem-metadataPublic sourceElevation rows disclose dataset id, version, datum, tile/cell, license, and provenance status when available.Incomplete DEM metadata lowers station elevation evidence strength.Report does not fabricate upstream DEM details.
terrain-mask-defaultPublic sourceSelected-pair stations use public Copernicus DEM-derived terrain masks.Visibility thresholds include the retained DEM-derived selected-pair terrain screening mask.This is not a surveyed RF horizon.
atmospheric-grid-lookupSource gapAtmospheric lookup rows disclose whether local grid values exist.When local grid values are unavailable, rain/atmospheric results remain in model space.Source gaps are explicit evidence boundaries.
Assumptions and limitsStandards usedModeled outputsHandover policy gatesRF chain
Evidence lineage Model lineage
Modeled outputs Standards-derived

Modeled outputs use runtime inputs, policy thresholds, and standards references.

demo-balanced-v1-policy | fspl-rain-gas-assumed-antenna-link-budget-v1 | selected-pair-throughput-estimate-v2 | selected-pair-jitter-estimate-v1 | selected-pair-propagation-delay-v1 | selected-pair-rain-impact-v1
解讀
這些卡片說明連線預算、延遲、抖動、吞吐量、降雨影響與換手數值是怎麼算出來的。
資料來源
每張模型卡都列出引用標準、使用的輸入，以及不能用它證明的事情。
限制
模型輸出不是實測服務資料，也不是商用路由證據。
Station inputs Source gap
Source gap

Station inputs currently retain elevation and terrain-mask source status; antenna diameter, EIRP, and polarization remain unavailable.

station-rf-profile:cht-yangmingshan | station-rf-profile:sansa-hartebeesthoek
解讀
如果站點 RF 參數缺失，RF chain 只能當模型計算參考，不能當成站點硬體事實。
資料來源
Station RF profile gaps 列在 Sources 分頁。
限制
缺少站點 RF 來源時，模型卡不會產生站點專屬 RF 事實。

Model lineage separates formulas, scenario inputs, station inputs, and missing sources.

Assumptions and limits

Assumptions and limits 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Item 限制或假設的來源類別。 先判斷它限制的是 truth boundary、metric anchor 還是 runtime inventory。 限制不是錯誤；它定義 report 不能支持的結論。
Limit / assumption 這次 report 必須保留的限制文字。 把這欄當成讀取數據前的上限條件。 不能被模型輸出、圖表或 summary wording 覆蓋。
Not evidence of 這列明確不能證明的事情。 做對外結論前先檢查這欄。 避免把合理計算說成實測、服務水準保證或真實營運事件。
ItemLimit / assumptionHow to readApplies toNot evidence of
Truth boundary 1Pair derivable from public station coordinates and satellite ephemerides only. No operator or contractual attestation.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Truth boundary 2Per-orbit communication metrics are modeled-precision via 3GPP TR 38.811 + ITU-R P.618-14 / P.676-13 plus assumed Tier-B antenna pattern parameters (ITU-R S.1528 / S.465-6), and handover decisions use the demo-balanced-v1 policy (TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2 + V-MO1 verbal addendum), not measured service telemetry.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Truth boundary 3Assumed antenna parameters are model inputs only; real station RF hardware, EIRP, dish size, and polarization remain source gaps.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Truth boundary 4Satellite candidates are limited to orbit classes disclosed by both selected stations (LEO/MEO/GEO), ranked by TLE/SGP4 pair-visibility geometry, then capped at LEO 200, MEO 100, GEO 60 records for interactive compute.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Truth boundary 5TLE snapshot artifacts are attributed to CelesTrak public GP data; the browser reads bundled files only.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Truth boundary 6SATCAT constellation membership in this TLE snapshot: 600 ONEWEB, 33 GALILEO, 6 INTELSAT.Treat this as the upper bound for what the report can prove.Summary, Requirements, Sources, ModelsMeasured operation, service-level guarantee, radio-layer switch trace, or real route.
Metric anchorMetric anchors are model labels and policy controls, not measured throughput, jitter, latency, routing, SLA, or station RF hardware truth.Read communication metrics as model anchors tied to this payload.Summary, Requirements, ModelsMeasured service KPI, packet trace, or customer acceptance evidence.
Runtime inventoryNetwork snapshot inventory, active runtime inventory, accepted records, runtime cap, and visible actor count are separate counts.Separate accepted source records, runtime caps, and visible actors.Sources: Runtime inventory; Raw data: Actor provenanceComplete satellite catalog, active service list, or operator assignment.

Standards used

Standards used 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Standard / reference 模型或政策引用的標準文件與章節。 用來追溯公式或政策依據。 引用標準不等於本次資料已被外部驗收。
Used for 該標準在本 report 裡支援的模型區塊。 把標準和 Modeled outputs / policy gates 對照。 不能外推到未列出的模型或資料來源。
Boundary 這個標準引用不能支持的結論。 把它當成防止過度宣稱的界線。 不是實測服務資料，也不是營運路由證據。
Standard / referenceUsed forSource roleHow to readBoundary
3GPP TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2Handover policy gates (demo-balanced-v1)Standards-derivedUse as the policy reference for model-selected handover thresholds.Not an operator event log, RF handover trace, or live gateway record.
ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1Rain attenuation modelStandards-derivedUse as a formula reference for scenario rain-loss calculation.Not local measured weather or calibrated station rain history.
ITU-R P.676-13Gas absorption modelStandards-derivedUse as a formula reference for atmospheric absorption calculation.Not measured link performance or service availability evidence.
ITU-R S.1528-0 Annex 1Satellite antenna gain model with assumed Tier-B parametersStandards-derivedUse as the satellite antenna-pattern reference for the selected-pair runtime model.Not operator beam assignment, measured antenna gain, or station RF hardware truth.
ITU-R S.465-6Earth-station antenna gain model with assumed Tier-B parametersStandards-derivedUse as the earth-station antenna-pattern reference for the selected-pair runtime model.Not real dish size, EIRP, polarization, or measured RF hardware truth.
3GPP TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2Modeled output: handoverStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
V-MO1Modeled output: handoverStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
3GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2Modeled output: link-budgetStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1Modeled output: link-budgetStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R P.676-13 Annex 2Modeled output: link-budgetStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R S.1528-0 Annex 1Modeled output: link-budgetStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R S.465-6Modeled output: link-budgetStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
3GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2Modeled output: throughputStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1Modeled output: throughputStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R S.1528-0 Annex 1Modeled output: throughputStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R S.465-6Modeled output: throughputStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1Modeled output: jitterStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
3GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2Modeled output: latencyStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
3GPP TR 38.811 clause 5.3.1.1Modeled output: latencyStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.
ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1Modeled output: rain-impactStandards-derivedUse to trace which standards reference supports this model output.Does not turn the modeled output into measured service data.

Modeled outputs

Modeled outputs 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Output kind 模型輸出的類型，例如 link budget、latency 或 rain effect。 先確認它是哪一種模型結果，再看數值和單位。 模型值不是實測服務資料。
Model / standards 產生該輸出的模型 id 與引用標準。 用來追溯計算依據。 引用標準不代表本次資料已被外部驗收。
Inputs / limit 模型使用的輸入摘要與限制。 確認結果是否依賴缺少來源或情境輸入。 不能宣稱服務水準保證、實測吞吐或真實營運路由。

Handover policy gates

Handover policy gates 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Policy 本次換手判定使用的模型政策。 和 Handover tab 的事件原因一起看。 不是無線層原生換手或營運商事件。
Threshold / value 政策門檻與本次使用值。 用來理解模型何時改選衛星。 不是 RF 實測門檻。
Source / model / limit 門檻來源、模型 id 與限制。 確認哪些是模型假設，哪些有標準或來源支撐。 不能用來宣稱實際閘道指派紀錄。
PolicyThresholdValueSource strengthSourceModelLimit
demo-balanced-v1latencyBudgetMs600modeledhandover-policy:demo-balanced-v13gpp-tr-38.821-v-mo1-policyRuntime policy thresholds are modeled controls, not operator SLA.
demo-balanced-v1hysteresisDb2modeledhandover-policy:demo-balanced-v13gpp-tr-38.821-v-mo1-policyRuntime policy thresholds are modeled controls, not operator SLA.
demo-balanced-v1minVisibilityWindowMs60000modeledhandover-policy:demo-balanced-v13gpp-tr-38.821-v-mo1-policyRuntime policy thresholds are modeled controls, not operator SLA.
demo-balanced-v1elevationThresholdDeg10modeledhandover-policy:demo-balanced-v13gpp-tr-38.821-v-mo1-policyRuntime policy thresholds are modeled controls, not operator SLA.

RF chain

RF chain 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
RF item RF chain 中使用或缺少的項目。 逐項看是否有來源或只是模型假設。 不是站點專屬 RF 硬體清單。
Unavailable fields 目前沒有來源的 RF 參數。 看到 unavailable/source gap 時，不要解讀成已知硬體規格。 模型輸出不會補齊缺少來源。
Limit RF chain 可支持與不能支持的結論。 用它限制 link budget 或 handover 的判讀範圍。 不是實測服務資料。

Honesty grading matrixModel-boundary disclosureStandards conformanceRain sensitivityReproducibility imprintVerification statusRetained standards documents

Honesty grading matrix

How to read this report

Every displayed value is tiered by how it is produced: real compute (recomputed geometry/timing), standard model (a published formula at representative geometry), illustrative proxy (a bounded stand-in, not a measured rate), or external gap (not produced, disclosed pending). A standard model is still a model; a proxy is not a measurement.

Displayed valueFidelityHow it is producedBoundary
Satellite position / trajectoryReal computeSGP4 propagation of public TLE -> ECI -> GMST -> ECEF -> geodeticReproducible; see Raw data + the in-app provenance popover
Visibility window / elevationReal computeMutual-visibility geometry recomputed per route from the propagated trackGated by elevation geometry only
Comm time / handover countReal computePer-sample serving decision over the windowHandover count excludes the initial acquisition
Slant range / one-way delayStandard modelTR 38.811 §6.6.2 spherical geometry from the SGP4-propagated satellite radiusRepresentative geometry, not a ranging measurement
FSPL / gas / rain attenuationStandard modelTR 38.811 §6.6.2 / ITU-R P.676-13 / ITU-R P.618-14 at representative geometryModeled, not measured propagation
Throughput (Mbps)Illustrative proxyClear-sky reference capacity de-rated by atmospheric fade + assumed antenna off-axis lossNot a packet-test rate; no EIRP / noise / bandwidth
Received power (RSRP proxy)Illustrative proxyCombined assumed antenna gain minus total path lossRelative proxy, not a measured RSRP; EIRP is not available
Packet latency / jitter / loss, RF hardware, link-local weatherExternal gapNot produced by the viewerDisclosed pending; not invented

Model-boundary disclosure

Current state of the link-budget geometry after the WS-F model-fidelity pass. S1-S3 were improved using geometry already in hand; S4 and the external gaps remain disclosed proxies / gaps and are not filled with invented numbers.

BoundaryStateCurrent behaviourRemaining limit
Slant range altitude (S1)ImprovedUses the SGP4-propagated per-satellite geocentric radius (was a nominal class altitude)Still a spherical-earth representative geometry
Representative elevation (S2)ImprovedUses the instantaneous per-station elevation, binding the worse (lower-elevation) station (was the constant pass maximum)One representative leg, not a full two-hop budget
Rain latitude (S3)ImprovedRain is computed per station at its own latitude/height and binds the worse station (was the pair-midpoint latitude)Driven by the demo rain-rate input, not a measured rain field
Throughput / RSRP (S4)Disclosed proxyKept as proxies; a Shannon/SNR rate is not computed because EIRP, noise temperature, and bandwidth are not availableFilling these would be false precision over an unmeasured stack
Packet-test KPIs, native RF handover, station RF hardware, link-local weather, surveyed horizon, acceptance thresholdsExternal gapOut of the viewer's scope; no measured value is produced or claimedDisclosed pending; not invented

Standards conformance

Each modeled quantity, the published formula, its standard clause, and one sample input -> output taken from this route's representative geometry. The magnitudes are modeled / standard-derived, not measured.

QuantityFormulaStandard clauseSample input -> output (this route)
Free-space path lossFSPL = 20·log10(d_km) + 20·log10(f_GHz) + 92.453GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2 (Eq 6.6-2)GEO: d=38613.9 km, f=20 GHz -> 210.21 dB
One-way propagation delaytau = d_slant / c + fixed processing3GPP TR 38.811 §6.6.2 + clause 5.3.1.1GEO: d=38613.9 km -> 130.802 ms (incl. fixed processing)
Rain attenuationA = gammaR · L_E, gammaR = k·R^alpha, L_E = L_R·v0.01ITU-R P.618-14 §2.2.1.1 (Steps 2-9); k/alpha via P.838-3GEO: R=0 mm/h, el=31.2°, lat=25.2° -> 0.00 dB (clear sky)
Gas absorptionA_gas = (gamma_o + gamma_w) · slant pathITU-R P.676-13 Annex 2GEO: f=20 GHz, el=30.0° -> 0.539 dB
Satellite antenna patternG(theta) roll-off from assumed peak gain + beamwidthITU-R S.1528-0 Annex 1GEO: combined assumed antenna gain 91.9 dB
Earth-station antenna patternG(phi) sidelobe envelope from assumed diameterITU-R S.465-6GEO: combined assumed antenna gain 91.9 dB
Handover triggerargmax(received-power proxy) + hysteresis + dwell gate3GPP TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2 + V-MO1 cross-orbit-live5 handovers across 6 serving events

Rain sensitivity

Modeled throughput proxy and jitter at the route's GEO representative geometry as the rain-rate input is swept. This is the same model the live rain slider drives; the rate is the demo input, not a measured rain field, and the rate -> throughput curve is illustrative (no packet test).

Rain rateThroughput proxyJitterChange vs clear sky
0 mm/h43.9 Mbps8.0 msreference
5 mm/h33.8 Mbps10.1 ms-23.0%
10 mm/h27.5 Mbps11.7 ms-37.2%
25 mm/h18.2 Mbps15.0 ms-58.5%
50 mm/h11.2 Mbps18.9 ms-74.4%

Reproducibility imprint

FieldValue
Routetle-first-runtime
StationsTW Chunghwa Telecom Yangmingshan Earth Station / ZA SANSA Space Operations Hartebeesthoek
Time window2026-05-17T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-17T06:00:00Z
Shared orbitsLEO / MEO / GEO
Visibility windows64
Handover count5
Payload checksum (FNV-1a)f4e19f8b
Report generated2026-06-14T21:58:34.532Z
Determinism

Re-running computeRuntimeProjection on the same route, time window, and TLE snapshot reproduces this payload checksum. The retained HTML and CSV sha256 are recorded in deliverable/selected-pair-source-evidence/evidence-manifest.json; the report's own generation timestamp is wall-clock and is excluded from the payload checksum.

Verification status

CheckResultRe-run withAs of
Bucket-A coverage gate (g1)19 / 19 passnpm run verify:g12026-06-15
24-hour stability soakpass (retained run)acceptance soak2026-05-16
Over-claim wording gatepassnpm test (verify-phase0)continuous
TLE completeness + baselinespassnpm run verify:tle2026-06-15
Runtime physics unit suitepassnpm run test:unit2026-06-15

SGP4 correctness is cross-checked against an independent python-sgp4 2.25 (SGP4 (Vallado et al., AIAA 2006 reference implementation), WGS72): 9 reference vectors, agreement within 1 km. The in-app provenance popover renders the app value vs this reference side by side. Representative geometry source: sgp4-propagated-representative (ABS-2A (MONGOLSAT-1) at 2026-05-17T03:00:00Z).

Retained standards documents

The formulas above are grounded in retained 3GPP / ITU-R PDFs (sha256 below; full set and section map in deliverable/3gpp-itu-references/README.md). A standard document grounds a formula; it is not a measurement of this link.

Retained PDFStandard / clauseSHA-256

R-REC-P.676-13-202208-I!!PDF-E.pdfITU-R P.676-13 Annex 28c09b2d2c120bdae33f60c2a7abff873374d54075ce0dc71060de8a5507bbe2f
R-REC-S.1528-0-200106-I!!PDF-E.pdfITU-R S.1528-0 Annex 1a3b3d6b79ce267524594e3cb0d82d0300b1faa1c57f47a21ba90c761312f8d41
R-REC-S.465-6-201001-I!!PDF-E.pdfITU-R S.465-6a813d82235c24ad52681634d5d8a1275da621317ddb1a6754cd983643024f98a
38821-g20.pdf3GPP TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2 + V-MO1 cross-orbit-live4ac0c498187d91c17b1a8cb900364e6c692d1ce29619bd243a678c2bfdc67378
Actor provenanceVisibility provenanceRaw JSON payload

Actor provenance

Actor provenance 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Satellite / orbit 每顆出現在本報告中的衛星與軌道類別。 用來和 Sources 的衛星來源紀錄互相核對。 不代表實際正在提供服務的衛星清單。
Samples / cadence runtime 對該 actor 的取樣數與取樣間隔。 用來判斷模型時間解析度。 不是 telemetry 實測取樣。
First / last UTC 本次推算涵蓋的時間範圍。 和 selected time window 一起看。 不是實際服務觀測時間。
SatelliteOrbitSourceSamplesCadence sFirst UTCLast UTCWindow countSource strength

Visibility provenance

Visibility provenance 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Station windows 同一衛星對兩站各自可見的時間窗。 用來追查 Visibility 表格每一列怎麼算出來。 不是實際連線紀錄。
Pair intersection 兩站可見時間窗的交集。 交集存在代表模型候選窗口，不代表通訊成功。 不含封包測試、吞吐或服務水準保證。
Elevation threshold / source strength 仰角門檻與來源強度。 和 Sources 的站點高程、地形遮罩一起核對。 不是站點實測地平線。
SatelliteOrbitSourceStation A windowsStation B windowsPair intersectionElevation thresholdCadence sStart UTCEnd UTCSource strength

Raw JSON payload

Raw JSON payload 欄位解讀

欄位 數據代表什麼 怎麼解讀 來源與限制
Payload root 這次 report 使用的完整原始資料結構。 用來查核表格與摘要中每個值的原始欄位。 原始 JSON 只保存本次輸出。
Arrays / objects runtime 匯出的巢狀資料。 展開節點後可追溯到各 tab 的表格來源。 不會補上缺少的外部證據。
Null / unavailable values 原始資料中缺少或不可用的欄位。 缺值要保留為限制，不能用 UI 文字補成事實。 不是已驗證資料。

Use this tree to verify the exact raw values exported in this report.

truthBoundary: Object
precisionLabel: "modeled-precision"
sourceTier: "geometric-derived"
nonClaims: Array(6)
0: "Pair derivable from public station coordinates and satellite ephemerides only. No operator or contractual attestation."
1: "Per-orbit communication metrics are modeled-precision via 3GPP TR 38.811 + ITU-R P.618-14 / P.676-13 plus assumed Tier-B antenna pattern parameters (ITU-R S.1528 / S.465-6), and handover decisions use the demo-balanced-v1 policy (TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2 + V-MO1 verbal addendum), not measured service telemetry."
2: "Assumed antenna parameters are model inputs only; real station RF hardware, EIRP, dish size, and polarization remain source gaps."
3: "Satellite candidates are limited to orbit classes disclosed by both selected stations (LEO/MEO/GEO), ranked by TLE/SGP4 pair-visibility geometry, then capped at LEO 200, MEO 100, GEO 60 records for interactive compute."
4: "TLE snapshot artifacts are attributed to CelesTrak public GP data; the browser reads bundled files only."
5: "SATCAT constellation membership in this TLE snapshot: 600 ONEWEB, 33 GALILEO, 6 INTELSAT."

pairSourceAttribution: Object
